eng: c) to reel, stagger in drunkenness
b) to be weary, exhausted, worn out, disabled by hunger, thirst, fatigue, disease
Ethpa. a) to be shaken to and fro, ill-treated, harassed, agitated
b) usually pass. part. to shake, harass, agitate, vex
Pael. a) to buffet or smite repeatedly, treat roughly; to shake to and fro, shake off leaves, strip off leaves
to smite, buffet, dash against; to clap, flap, wave
